title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot access it.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not responding.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city even after updating it in settings.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on Android 13.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Password Reset Email Not Received
description: Customer tried to reset password but did not receive the reset email.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Customer reports that the website loads very slowly during checkout.

title: Order Not Showing in History
description: Customer placed an order but it does not appear in their order history.

title: Email Notifications Not Working
description: Customer is not receiving any email notifications for updates or alerts.

title: Duplicate Charges on Account
description: Customer was charged twice for the same transaction.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failed
description: Customer cannot upload a profile picture; upload fails every time.
